summary: Venue Availability Calendar Feature Testing Complete. All backend APIs (13/13 tests passed) and frontend UI components verified working correctly.

issues: React warning: 'tr cannot be a child of span' - cosmetic hydration warning from Emergent wrapper, does not affect functionality

critical_code_review_comments: All availability calendar features implemented correctly
Bulk update API working with dates, status, time_slot, and notes
Hold date feature correctly validates against blocked dates
Max 2 extensions limit enforced for non-admin users
Auto-release of expired holds implemented in GET endpoints
Public venue page shows availability indicator with colored dots
Date Holds section visible in RM Lead Detail sidebar
seed_data_creation: Test data already exists: venue_id: venue_ac489187b511, lead_id: lead_ed08103a8038. March 1-3 blocked dates.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Venue Availability Calendar features fully verified. Key implementations: 1) Venue Owner Calendar at /venue-owner/calendar showing March 2026 with 3 blocked dates (1-3) and working date selection/bulk update. 2) Public venue page at /venues/{venue_id} shows Upcoming Availability section with colored dots (Green=Available, Red=Blocked). 3) RM Lead Detail at /rm/leads/{lead_id} has Date Holds section in sidebar with Hold Date for Client button, showing active holds with extension count and Release buttons.

backend_bulk_availability_update.POST /api/venues/{venue_id}/availability: PASS - Updates multiple dates with status, time_slot, notes
backend_bulk_availability_update.GET /api/venues/{venue_id}/availability: PASS - Returns slots for venue by month

backend_date_hold_apis.POST /api/venues/{venue_id}/hold-date: PASS - Creates 24h hold for lead on venue date
backend_date_hold_apis.POST /api/venues/{venue_id}/hold-date/{h: PASS - Extends hold by 24h, max 2 extensions enforced
backend_date_hold_apis.DELETE /api/venues/{venue_id}/hold-date/: PASS - Releases hold and sets date back to available
backend_date_hold_apis.GET /api/leads/{lead_id}/holds: PASS - Returns all holds for lead with hours_remaining

backend_access_control.blocked_date_hold_rejected: PASS - Returns 400 with proper error message

frontend_venue_owner_calendar.date_selection: PASS - Click to select, shows 'Update N Date(s)' button
frontend_venue_owner_calendar.bulk_update_dialog: PASS - Status dropdown, Time Slot dropdown, Notes textarea, Cancel/Update buttons
frontend_venue_owner_calendar.blocked_dates_display: PASS - March 1-3 shown in red with 'Blocked' badge
frontend_venue_owner_calendar.stats_cards: PASS - Shows Available Days, Tentative Days, Blocked Days, Booked Days counts

frontend_public_venue_page.date_ranges: PASS - Shows '28 Feb', '1 Mar - 3 Mar', '4 Mar - 13 Mar'

frontend_rm_lead_detail.date_holds_section: PASS - Visible in sidebar with calendar icon
frontend_rm_lead_detail.active_holds_list: PASS - Shows venue name, date, time slot, remaining time, extension count
frontend_rm_lead_detail.hold_date_button: PASS - 'Hold Date for Client' button opens dialog
frontend_rm_lead_detail.hold_dialog_elements: PASS - Venue selector, Date picker, Time slot selector, duration info (24h), extension info (2 max)
frontend_rm_lead_detail.extend_hold_button: PASS - '+24h' button shown for holds with <2 extensions
frontend_rm_lead_detail.release_button: PASS - Red 'Release' button to manually release hold
